heading_content_part: We may work with analytics companies to help us understand how the Application/Game is being used, such as the frequency and duration of usage.

decoder_heading: We work with advertisers and third party advertising networks
ident_heading: We work with advertisers and third party advertising networks
heading_content_part: We work with advertisers and third party advertising networks, who need to know how you interact with advertising provided in the Application/Game which helps us keep the cost of the Application/Game low.

decoder_heading: Advertisers and advertising networks use some of the information collected by the Application/Game
ident_heading: Advertisers and advertising networks use some of the information collected by the Application/Game
heading_content_part: Advertisers and advertising networks use some of the information collected by the Application/Game, including, but not limited to, the unique identification ID of your mobile device and your mobile telephone number. To protect the anonymity of this information, we use an encryption technology to help ensure that these third parties canít identify you personally. These third parties may also obtain anonymous information about other applications youíve downloaded to your mobile device, the mobile websites you visit, your non-precise location information (e.g., your zip code), and other non- precise location information in order to help analyze and serve anonymous targeted advertising on the Application/Game and elsewhere. We may also share encrypted versions of information you have provided in order to enable our partners to append other available information about you for analysis or advertising related use.
